content.query:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [customer].[stg_claims_tmp_t]
( 
	[TOKEN] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[CLAIM_NUM] [nvarchar](200)  NULL,
	[DOS_BEGIN] [nvarchar](8)  NULL,
	[DOS_END] [nvarchar](8)  NULL,
	[PATIENT_GENDER] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[PATIENT_AGE] [nvarchar](3)  NULL,
	[PATIENT_ZIP_3] [nvarchar](3)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
